news.t: These dividend-paying stock ETFs are jumping as investors await ‘Trump 2.0'

holdings.infoBox: DDIV is an equity ETF with a total of 52 individual holdings. The top holdings are AGNC Investment stock at 5.39%, Omega Healthcare Investors at 4.41%, Invesco at 3.73%, Edison International at 3.66%, and Philip Morris International at 3.40%.

overview.description: The First Trust Dorsey Wright Momentum & Dividend ETF (DDIV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of 50 large- and mid-cap, high-yield stocks exhibiting relative strength. Holdings are weighted by dividend yield. DDIV was launched on Mar 10, 2014 and is issued by First Trust.
infoTable: Dorsey Wright Momentum Plus Dividend Yield Index

data.title: These dividend-paying stock ETFs are jumping as investors await ‘Trump 2.0'
data.text: This week's ETF Wrap takes you inside the rally in dividend-paying equity ETFs as investors seek to position for President-elect Donald Trump's second term in the White House.
